content:
I completed the copilot-cli analysis and wrote COPILOT_ANALYSIS.md at the repo root. I attempted to mark task 's4' complete via team_task_complete but it failed because the task is currently assigned to tm-001. Please either reassign s4 to me (tm-004) or mark it complete for me. Note: I have claimed task 's5' next. The COPILOT_ANALYSIS.md file summarizes user features, auth flows, architecture notes, comparisons to ragent, and prioritized suggestions. File path: ./COPILOT_ANALYSIS.md

If you want me to unclaim s5 and leave it for others, I can release it—please advise.
